task_completion.description: Verify that the global prediction constraints are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GPredict Preferences window under the 'Predict' section. The 'Minimum elevation' should be set to 40 degrees, 'Maximum sun elevation' to -12 degrees, and 'Number of passes' to 20.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Chicago_Urban' ground station has been created with the correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Ground Station configuration window or list. There should be a station named 'Chicago_Urban' with Latitude 41.8781, Longitude -87.6298 (or 87.6298 W), and Altitude 181 meters.

task_completion.description: Verify that a new tracking module named 'Urban_Bright' is created and bound to the 'Chicago_Urban' ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a module tab or configuration window named 'Urban_Bright'. The ground station associated with this module (often visible in the module's properties or header) must be 'Chicago_Urban'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the ISS and CSS satellites are added to the 'Urban_Bright' module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Urban_Bright' module's tracking list, radar, or map view. It should explicitly list ISS (ZARYA) (NORAD 25544) and CSS (TIANHE) (NORAD 48274).

task_completion.description: Verify that the default 'Amateur' module has been deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the main GPredict window. The default 'Amateur' tab should no longer be visible among the open modules.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the GPredict GUI to make these changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with GPredict's menus, preferences, and module configuration dialogs, rather than just typing commands in a terminal.

integrity.description: Verify that the changes are reflected in the actual GPredict application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The GPredict application interface should be visible and active, not a text editor modifying configuration files directly.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not bypass the UI by manually editing the GPredict config files.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing text editors (like nano or vim) editing files in the ~/.config/Gpredict/ directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Prediction Constraints: Min Elevation = 40, Max Sun Elevation = -12, Passes = 20. Expected Ground Station: Name = 'Chicago_Urban', Lat = 41.8781, Lon = -87.6298 (87.6298 W), Alt = 181m. Expected Module: Name = 'Urban_Bright', bound to 'Chicago_Urban'. Expected Satellites: ISS (ZARYA) (NORAD 25544) and CSS (TIANHE) (NORAD 48274). The 'Amateur' module must be deleted.
